title: Verizon, BT Merge International Units in Pivot to Home Markets
title_cn: Verizon 与 BT 合并国际业务，转向国内市场
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. and the UK’s BT Group Plc agreed to create a joint venture for their international businesses in a merger that will take the low-margin units off their books and allow the carriers to focus on their home markets.

title: PBOC’s New Overnight Rate Said Below Forecasts in Hint at Easing
title_cn: 中国人民银行新隔夜利率低于预期暗示宽松
summary: China’s central bank set the interest rate on its new overnight liquidity tool at a level that was below expectations, according to people familiar with the matter, in what some economists see as a de facto rate cut that could push down market borrowing costs.

title: Copper Steadies as Traders Eye Iran Peace Talks and Fed Outlook
title_cn: 交易员关注伊朗和平谈判和美联储前景，铜价稳定
summary: Copper steadied as traders awaited fresh peace talks between the US and Iran and the outlook for US monetary policy as the Federal Reserve takes a hawkish stance on inflation.

title: Dip Buyers Lift US Stocks Despite Rise in Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 尽管油价上涨，但买家逢低提振美国股市：市场总结
summary: Bargain hunters are pushing stocks higher at the start of a week in which leaders of the biggest central banks and a busy data calendar will set the tone. Oil rose after a weekend of tensions in the Middle East.

title: Godiva’s Japan Lenders Agree on Nine-Month Loan Extension
title_cn: Godiva 的日本贷款机构同意将贷款延期九个月
summary: Lenders to Godiva Japan Inc. have agreed to extend by nine months the maturity of about ¥75 billion ($463 million) in loans to the struggling chocolate maker, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Nigerian Government Seeks Advisers for Planned Eurobond Offering
title_cn: 尼日利亚政府为计划发行的欧洲债券寻求顾问
summary: Nigeria invited expressions of interest from advisers for a planned Eurobond sale, the first since a November issuance drew five times more demand than the amount on offer.

title: Hormuz Traffic Declines as Ship Attacks Spark New Concerns
title_cn: 船舶袭击引发新担忧，霍尔木兹交通量下降
summary: Commercial traffic through the Strait of Hormuz this weekend persisted at a reduced level as a handful of vessels made open transits. Traffic was still higher than for most of the US-Iran war, but attacks on two ships raised fresh concerns about the ability and willingness of shipowners to traverse the waterway. Alaric Nightingale reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Risks in Focus After US Stocks’ Wild Start to 2026
title_cn: 2026 年美股开局狂野后，风险成为焦点
summary: Investors are grappling with a series of risks, from AI to rising interest rates and US elections.

title_cn: 蓬勃发展的银行资本市场提供了最薄弱环节的免费通行证
summary: In the market for junior bank capital — where distinctions between strong and weak banks matter most — investors are becoming remarkably indifferent.

title: South Korea Bets $880B on AI Chips & Data Centers | The Pulse 6/29/2026
title_cn: 韩国在人工智能芯片和数据中心上押注 880B 美元 |脉搏 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Marieke Blom, ING Chief Economist and Global Head of Research; Eirik Lie, Kongsberg CEO; Jeremy Allaire, Circle CEO; Frank Smets, Bank for International Settlements Acting Head of the Monetary & Economic Department    (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Bonds Take Burnham's Plan to Overhaul Government in Stride
title_cn: 英国债券大步接受伯纳姆的政府改革计划

title: Gold Drops as Traders Watch Iran Tensions for Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 交易员关注伊朗紧张局势和通胀前景，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following tit-for-tat strikes that tested a fragile truce in a war that has fueled global inflationary pressures.

title: US & Iran Halt Attacks, Samsung, SK Prep Record Spending | The Opening Trade 6/29/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗停止袭击，三星、SK 准备创纪录支出开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary:
The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues, paving the way to end days of tit-for-tat attacks that tested a fragile truce. 

South Korea unveiled an ambitious plan aimed at cementing its status as a technological powerhouse, with companies led by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix initiating large-scale investments in memory chips, data centers and robotics.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US and Iran Agree to Halt Attacks Ahead of Talks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意在会谈前停止袭击
summary:
The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues.

It follows days of tit-for-tat attacks that risk slowing progress toward restoring traffic through the vital waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Is Abandoning Bets on a Stronger Euro
title_cn: 华尔街放弃押注欧元走强
summary: Wall Street banks are capitulating on bets for a stronger euro, as markets see the US outpacing Europe on interest-rate hikes for the rest of this year.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Framework Deal
title_cn: 以色列与黎巴嫩达成框架协议
summary: Israel, Lebanon, and the US reached an initial trilateral framework agreement aimed at paving the way for ending the conflict between Israel and Lebanon and ultimately reaching a peace settlement. Bloomberg's Dan Williams reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Births Two Robot Unicorns as Sector Funding Stays Strong
title_cn: 行业资金强劲，中国诞生两家机器人独角兽
summary: Two Chinese robotics startups have been valued at more than $2.9 billion in recent funding rounds, demonstrating steady interest in the sector and boosting the country’s efforts to compete with US firms like Tesla Inc. and Figure AI Inc.

title: JPMorgan’s Matejka Is Biggest Europe Stocks Bull With New Target
title_cn: 摩根大通的马泰卡是欧洲股市最大的牛市，并设定了新目标
summary: As European stocks were hammered by the Iran war, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Mislav Matejka predicted the declines would be short-lived. The strategist is now doubling down, becoming the biggest bull among forecasters tracked by Bloomberg.

title: Chinese Investors Review Bond Holdings as Ratings Face Scrutiny
title_cn: 评级面临审查，中国投资者审视债券持有量
summary: Chinese asset managers are reviewing their bond holdings to identify issuers at risk of rating downgrades after regulators stepped up efforts to curb the over-concentration of AAA ratings, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Spain Lifts 2026 Economic-Growth Forecast Despite Iran War
title_cn: 尽管伊朗战争，西班牙仍上调 2026 年经济增长预测
summary: Spain will continue to outperform the euro area’s largest economies, with the conflict in Iran expected to have only a limited impact, according to new government forecasts.

title: Kongsberg Has ‘Really Steep’ Demand for Its Missiles, CEO Says
title_cn: 康斯伯格首席执行官表示，对其导弹的需求“非常大”
summary: Kongsberg has seen a "positive movement forward" in European defense spending throughout last year, even though it’s still not yet at the level needed, its CEO Eirik Lie tells Bloomberg TV. Lie spoke to Bloomberg TV's Francine Lacqua ahead of July's NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, where European NATO states will be expected to prove they are progressing towards spending 5% of GDP on defense. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Ultimate Guide to National Parks, Without the Crowds
title_cn: 国家公园终极指南，远离人群
summary: US national parks are surging in popularity, between America’s 250th celebrations and the increasing demand for domestic travel. Our guide for 16 popular national parks from across the US is here to help you find ways around the crowds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Trades Near Four-Month Low as US and Iran Halt Fresh Attacks
title_cn: 随着美国和伊朗停止新的袭击，石油交易接近四个月低点
summary: Oil held above the lowest since the end of February after the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following flare-ups over the weekend that saw a supertanker hit near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Dubai Stocks Set for Best Quarter in a Year as War Premium Ebbs
title_cn: 随着战争溢价下降，迪拜股市将迎来一年来最好的季度
summary: Dubai’s stocks index is set for its best quarter in a year after a truce in the Middle East conflict drew investors back to a market they fled when Iranian missile attacks shattered the city-state’s reputation for stability.

title: Goldman Backs India 30-Year Bonds as Iran War Impact Contained
title_cn: 伊朗战争影响得到遏制 高盛支持印度30年期债券
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. recommends buying India’s 30-year government bonds as inflation expectations ease and lower oil prices reduce fiscal risks.

title: BAT Cuts 9,000 Jobs as Its Turnaround Program Intensifies
title_cn: 英美烟草公司 (BAT) 裁员 9,000 人，强化扭亏为盈计划
summary: British American Tobacco Plc is reducing its 47,000-strong global workforce by about one-fifth as part of its sweeping plan to bring down costs and simplify operations.

title: Moody’s Says India Rating Safe Despite Potential Deficit Gap
title_cn: 穆迪称印度评级为安全，尽管存在潜在赤字差距
summary: India can withstand a potentially wider-than-forecast fiscal deficit this year without jeopardizing its investment-grade rating, according to Moody’s Ratings, as higher energy prices are expected to pose only temporary budget pressures.

title: Prosus Profit Jumps as Bets on E-Commerce Businesses Pay Off
title_cn: Prosus 利润猛增，押注电子商务业务获得回报
summary: Prosus NV said profit more than doubled in the last fiscal year, beating analysts’ estimates as growth in the tech investment company’s e-commerce businesses and an increase in the value of the stake it owns in China’s Tencent Holdings Ltd. boosted earnings.

title: Comcast Plans to Spin Off NBCUniversal Into New Media Firm
title_cn: 康卡斯特计划将 NBCUniversal 分拆为新媒体公司
summary: Comcast Corp. said it plans to separate its media businesses from its cable-TV and internet operations, spinning off NBCUniversal and Sky into a new publicly traded company in a bid to increase value.

title: Ferrari Luce, New Golf Cart Reflect Apple Design Aesthetic
title_cn: Ferrari Luce，新款高尔夫球车体现 Apple 设计美学
summary: Ive, Hoenig reflect their Apple experience in new vehicles

title: Samsung, SK to Spend $880 Billion to Drive Korea’s AI Lead
title_cn: 三星、SK 将斥资 8800 亿美元推动韩国人工智能领先地位
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) from companies including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. into chips and data centers, a giant outlay in digital infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix at Center of South Korea's AI Drive
title_cn: 三星、SK 海力士是韩国人工智能驱动的中心
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least $880 billion from companies including Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix into infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era. Bloomberg's Sangmi Cha reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verizon Sees Quarterly Loss of Up to $800 Million Due to BT Deal
title_cn: 由于 BT 交易，Verizon 预计季度亏损高达 8 亿美元
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. projected a second-quarter loss of between $700 million and $800 million after striking a deal with UK’s BT Group Plc to create a joint venture for their international businesses.

title: China Pushes All School Levels to Teach AI in Xi’s Tech Drive
title_cn: 在习近平的科技驱动下，中国推动各级学校教授人工智能
summary: China has announced a formal plan to integrate artificial intelligence across all levels of schooling, aligning its education system with President Xi Jinping’s campaign to dominate advanced technologies.

title: Germany Wants and Needs AI to Take Human Jobs
title_cn: 德国希望并需要人工智能来取代人类的工作
summary: The country’s workforce is aging and retiring.

title: Chinese Spies, Smuggled Drugs Fuel Takaichi’s Security Push
title_cn: 中国间谍、走私毒品推动高市的安全行动
summary: Chinese spies stealing Japanese industrial secrets in boardrooms. Chip smugglers ferrying Nvidia’s prized artificial intelligence semiconductors via Japan. Drug gangs quietly slipping fentanyl across Japan’s borders to a US opioid crisis.

title: Google Cloud to Offer Specialist AI Models for Science Research
title_cn: 谷歌云将为科学研究提供专业人工智能模型
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google will start offering specialist artificial intelligence models from software company SandboxAQ through its cloud service, expanding enterprise and research access to technology designed to accelerate drug discovery, materials science and semiconductor manufacturing.

title: AirTrunk Is Said to Be Near Confidential Filing for Biggest Singapore IPO in Years
title_cn: 据称，AirTrunk 即将提交新加坡多年来最大规模的 IPO 申请
summary: Blackstone Inc.-backed data center operator AirTrunk is close to filing confidentially for an initial public offering of a real estate investment trust in Singapore, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: South Korea's Massive AI Investment Push
title_cn: 韩国大力推动人工智能投资
summary: South Korea is launching a 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) plan in corporate investments to build out critical AI infrastructure and cement its global dominance in the semiconductor market. President Lee Jae Myung called the sweeping mega-project a "national survival strategy" for the AI era. Bloomberg’s Avril Hong breaks down the press conference, where President Lee was joined by the CEOs of tech giants Samsung and SK Hynix to outline the multi-year roadmap. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player | Odd Lots
title_cn: 百度CFO谈其如何成为全栈AI玩家 |零股
summary: In the China tech space, Baidu is now a full-stack player in the AI industry. The company makes its own chips, has its own AI models (Ernie), its own cloud system, and it's integrating AI into its self-driving car business, Apollo Go. But before all this, Baidu was known for being China's leader in search. Things, obviously, have changed a lot since the company was founded in the late 1990s. In today's episode, we speak with Baidu CFO Henry He about the company's AI ambitions. He talks to us about maximizing token spend, how Chinese tech firms are thinking about safety and alignment, the global robotaxi competition, and how the core search business fits into the company now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sintra Has Catalyst Potential This Week: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 辛特拉本周具有催化剂潜力：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Rebound as Samsung, SK Hynix Unveil Spending Plan
title_cn: 三星、SK 海力士公布支出计划，韩国股市反弹
summary: South Korean stocks recouped earlier losses as Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. pledged massive investment during a government briefing that underscored the country’s commitment to AI development.

title: China Blacklists More Japan Entities Amid Feud | The China Show 6/29/2026
title_cn: 中国因不和将更多日本实体列入黑名单中国展 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prosus Focused on Growing Just Eat Globally, CEO Bloisi Says
title_cn: 首席执行官布洛伊西表示，Prosus 专注于在全球范围内发展 Just Eat
summary: Prosus CEO Fabricio Bloisi says its food takeaway firm Just Eat will start delivering growth in the next few months and has plans for global growth. Bloisi speaks on Bloomberg Television after Prosus announced that profit more than doubled last fiscal year, beating analysts’ estimates helped by growth in the tech investment company’s e-commerce businesses. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's Robots Try World Cup-Style Penalty Kicks
title_cn: 中国机器人尝试世界杯式点球
summary: Chinese humanoid robots are stealing the spotlight at Mobile World Congress in Shanghai — but can they keep up with the World Cup spirit? From penalty kicks to piano playing, Bloomberg's Stephen Engle puts them to the test. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s Rapid Delivery Push Triggers $15 Billion Rout for Eternal, Swiggy
title_cn: 亚马逊的快速配送推动 Eternal 和 Swiggy 损失 150 亿美元
summary: Eternal Ltd. and Swiggy Ltd. got the 10-minute delivery party going in India. Now, e-commerce titans Amazon.com Inc. and Walmart Inc.’s Flipkart are looking to crash it.

title: South Korea Unveils Plan to Sustain Lead in AI
title_cn: 韩国公布维持人工智能领先地位的计划
summary: South Korea unveiled an ambitious plan aimed at cementing its status as a technological powerhouse, with companies led by Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. initiating large-scale investments in memory chips, data centers and robotics. Samsung and SK Hynix leaders sat next to President Lee Jae Myung at a briefing, and are expected to give more details of their future investment plans. Bloomberg's Cat Barton reports from Seoul. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 Cleared by US for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 已获美国批准以供更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving concerns from Donald Trump's administration about the technology’s potential threats to national security. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Build Two Chip Fabs in $518 Billion Project
title_cn: 三星和 SK 海力士将在 5180 亿美元项目中建设两座芯片工厂
summary: The Samsung Electronics Co. semiconductor plant in Pyeongtaek, South Korea. Photographer: SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg

title: Germany Is Showcase for How to Use AI to Juice Your Economy
title_cn: 德国展示了如何利用人工智能来推动经济发展
summary: At a made-to-order homebuilder in northwest Germany, processing more than 250 invoices a week used to swallow the equivalent of four working days. After introducing artificial intelligence last year, the task takes half as long.

title: GM-Backed Self-Driving Firm Momenta Seeks $752 Million From Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: 通用汽车支持的自动驾驶公司 Momenta 在香港上市寻求 7.52 亿美元融资
summary: Autonomous-driving firm Momenta Global Ltd. started taking investor orders for its Hong Kong initial public offering to raise HK$5.9 billion ($752 million), pouncing on a multiyear high for share sales in the city.

title: アップル大幅値上げ、AIインフラ投資のツケが消費者に－Power On
title_cn: 苹果大幅涨价，消费者承担AI基础设施投资负担 - Power On
summary: AIブームが変えたアップルの価格戦略。コスト増を受けた値上げは一時的か、それともAI時代の新常態なのか。

title: China, India See Top Firms Lose Market Cap Share in AI Lag
title_cn: 中国、印度顶级企业因人工智能滞后而失去市值份额
summary: China, India, and Hong Kong have emerged as the only major stock markets worldwide where top companies account for a smaller share of market capitalization than a year ago, underscoring their lag in the global AI race.

title: Animation’s AI Reckoning: Filmmakers Say They Can Make Movies for 90% Less
title_cn: 动画的 AI 清算：电影制片人称他们制作电影的成本可以降低 90%
summary: Some animators believe AI will make films better. Others believe it will bring costs down.

title: Strait of Hormuz Flare-Ups Amplify US-Iran Risks
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡突发事件加剧美伊风险
summary: Starting a war is a lot easier than ending one, it seems

title: Burnham Vows Economic Boost by Taking Fiscal Power Out of London
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言通过将财政权力撤出伦敦来提振经济
summary: Andy Burnham has pledged to radically devolve fiscal powers away from Westminster should he succeed in his bid to replace Keir Starmer as prime minister.

title: UK's Burnham Vows Decentralized Power in Bid to Boost Economy
title_cn: 英国伯纳姆誓言权力下放以提振经济
summary: Andy Burnham, who is likely to be the UK's next prime minister following Keir Starmer's decision to resign, outlines plans to decentralize power in a bid to boost the economy and raise living standards. "I am going to give Britain the circuit breaker it needs by building a more collaborative politics," Burnham says during a speech in Manchester. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: An Unlikely Mix of Earthquake Support Rallies for Venezuela
title_cn: 一场不太可能发生的地震支持委内瑞拉集会
summary: Trump-aligned governments to stalwarts of the Maduro era rush to help Caracas.

title: Chinese Military Teases First Look of Sixth-Gen Jet in Video
title_cn: 中国军方在视频中首次展示第六代喷气式飞机
summary: China’s military appeared to give its first glimpse of a new fighter aircraft widely believed to be a sixth-generation prototype that could eventually rival advanced stealth warplanes under development in the US.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Spend $880 Billion on Chips, Data Centers
title_cn: 三星和 SK 海力士将斥资 8800 亿美元开发芯片和数据中心
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) from companies including Samsung and SK Hynix into chips and data centers, a giant outlay in digital infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era. Bloomberg's Shona Ghosh has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EIB Pledges Record €3 Billion Airbus Loan for Tech Development
title_cn: EIB 承诺为技术开发提供创纪录的 30 亿欧元空中客车贷款
summary: The European Investment Bank will provide an unprecedented €3 billion ($3.4 billion) loan to Airbus SE as the European Union pushes ahead with plans to bolster its technological sovereignty amid intensifying competition from the US and China.

title: Japan Protests China’s Maritime Claims After Bomber Flights
title_cn: 日本在轰炸机飞行后抗议中国的海事主张
summary: Japan has protested activity by Chinese coast guard vessels asserting Beijing’s claims to maritime borders close to a southern Japanese island, Tokyo’s top government spokesman said, days after Tokyo scrambled fighter jets in response to flights by Chinese and Russian bombers around Japan’s south.

title: China Escalates Takaichi Feud by Blacklisting More Japan Firms
title_cn: 中国将更多日本公司列入黑名单，加剧了高市的不和
summary: China expanded its export-control offensive against Japan, doubling the number of Japanese entities subject to curbs and deepening a feud with Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s government.

title: Putin Ready for Ukraine Talks But Won’t Halt Long-Range Strikes
title_cn: 普京准备好进行乌克兰会谈但不会停止远程打击
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin said he’s ready to continue talks with US envoys on ending the war in Ukraine, while rejecting a proposal to halt long-range strikes that have proven damaging for both sides.

title: Putin Acknowledges Russia Faces Fuel Supply Problems
title_cn: 普京承认俄罗斯面临燃料供应问题
summary: President Vladimir Putin said Russia continues to face a fuel supply squeeze as the Kremlin weighs measures to stabilize the domestic market following refinery outages.

title: Burnham Pledges Sweeping Devolution in Bid for UK Leadership
title_cn: 伯纳姆承诺彻底下放权力以争夺英国领导地位
summary: Andy Burnham will pledge the biggest devolution of power in England in modern times in his first major speech since confirming his intention to succeed Keir Starmer as the UK’s prime minister.

title: South Korea Confirms Over $1 Trillion in AI Spending | Daybreak Europe 6/29/2026
title_cn: 韩国确认人工智能支出超过 1 万亿美元 |黎明欧洲 6/29/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

South Korea unveiled an ambitious plan aimed at cementing its status as a technological powerhouse, with companies led by Samsung and SK Hynix initiating large-scale investments in memory chips, data centers and robotics.

The US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues, paving the way to end days of tit-for-tat attacks that tested a fragile truce.

Today's guest: Fabricio Bloisi, CEO, Prosus and Naspers Group (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brexit Makes Inflation Spirals More Likely, Says Bank of England Economist
title_cn: 英格兰银行经济学家表示，英国脱欧使通胀更有可能螺旋式上升
summary: Britain’s efforts to control inflation are being made harder by the country’s exit from the European Union, the Bank of England’s chief economist warned.

title: China's Commerce Minister Visits Europe for Trade Talks
title_cn: 中国商务部长访问欧洲进行贸易谈判
summary: EU Trade Commissioner Maros Sefcovic is set to meet Chinese Commerce Minister Wang Wentao in Brussels this week as the bloc presses Beijing to address a widening trade imbalance that reached about €360 billion ($410 billion) in 2025 and continued to expand this year. Bloomberg's Richard Bravo has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Burnham Set to Pledge Major Devolution in Speech
title_cn: 英国伯纳姆将承诺在言论上进行重大权力下放
summary: Andy Burnham will pledge the biggest devolution of power in England in modern times in his first major speech since confirming his intention to succeed Keir Starmer as prime minister. Bloomberg Opinion's Rosa Prince has a preview of the speech. Her views are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Airplane Hitting Beijing Tower Reveals Security Risk Near Xi
title_cn: 飞机撞上北京塔揭示习近平附近的安全风险
summary: A small plane that crashed into Beijing’s tallest skyscraper on Friday has exposed a vulnerability in the Chinese capital’s controlled airspace, prompting questions over safeguards around politically sensitive locations.

title: Man Group’s Ed Cole on AI, Inflation and the Changing Global Order
title_cn: 英仕曼集团的 Ed Cole 谈人工智能、通货膨胀和不断变化的全球秩序
summary: Despite agreeing that AI is likely as transformative as its proponents argue, Ed Cole believes it’s too early to understand whether there’s a bubble. Meanwhile, the growing backlash against globalization and an effort to reshore means traditional 60/40 portfolios are at risk of becoming outdated. A reallocation of assets across gold, small caps and liquid alternatives could be essential to keep up with a changing macro environment. Cole is the head of multi-strategy equities at Man Group, the world’s largest publicly-traded hedge fund. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia, Vanuatu Agree Deal After Impasse Over China Ties
title_cn: 澳大利亚与瓦努阿图在中国关系陷入僵局后达成协议
summary: Australia and the Pacific island nation of Vanuatu have sealed a cooperation deal, with the final agreement reported to be substantially revised from a preliminary accord signed last year.

title: Kennedy Center Lauds Bill Maher With Its Own Future Unknown
title_cn: 肯尼迪中心称赞比尔·马赫的未来未知
summary: The Kennedy Center on Sunday awarded Bill Maher the Mark Twain Prize for American Humor, lifting up a comedian who has tussled with President Donald Trump at a time when the arts institution’s future — and the control Trump has over it — has come into question.

title: Singapore’s Main Opposition Keeps Singh as Chief After Vote
title_cn: 新加坡主要反对党投票后维持辛格为首席
summary: Pritam Singh kept his role as leader of Singapore’s main opposition Workers’ Party after a special vote by cadres following his convictions for lying to a parliamentary committee.

title: US and Iran Agree to Halt Attacking Each Other Ahead of Talks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意在会谈前停止相互攻击
summary: The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues, paving the way to end days of tit-for-tat attacks that tested a fragile truce.

title: UK Plans ‘Hybrid’ Warship to Replace Aging Destroyer Fleet
title_cn: 英国计划用“混合”军舰取代老化的驱逐舰舰队
summary: Britain has scrapped plans to replace its aging warships with a new destroyer and will instead procure at least six so-called common combat vessels as it seeks to prepare the military for modern warfare.

title: Australia’s Ruling Labor Party Retakes Poll Lead From Right-Wing One Nation
title_cn: 澳大利亚执政工党从右翼一国党手中夺回民调领先地位
summary: Australia’s ruling Labor Party has retaken the lead in opinion polls, pushing the insurgent right-wing One Nation party into second place.

title: Trump Tours DC Projects, Says Golf Course to Be Renovated
title_cn: 特朗普参观华盛顿项目，称高尔夫球场将进行翻修
summary: President Donald Trump toured many of his renovation projects in Washington, DC, on Sunday, saying he would begin reconstruction of a city golf course along the Potomac River on Sept. 1.

title: Nigeria Antitrust Body Warns Fuel Prices Not Falling Fast Enough
title_cn: 尼日利亚反垄断机构警告燃油价格下跌速度不够快
summary: Nigeria’s antitrust commission said pump prices for fuel aren’t dropping fast enough in comparison to the sharp decline in oil prices, warning of a potential crackdown against a market dominated by Africa’s richest person.

title: Venezuela’s Machado Attempts Fast Return Amid Quake Response
title_cn: 委内瑞拉马查多试图在地震响应中快速返回
summary: Venezuela’s opposition leader María Corina Machado is working to return to the country as soon as possible, according to people with direct knowledge of her plans, a move that could reshape the political landscape as acting President Delcy Rodríguez struggles to respond to the nation’s worst natural disaster in decades.

title: Trump’s U-Turn on Iran Sanctions Would Unravel Decades of Curbs
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗制裁的大转变将瓦解数十年的限制
summary: The Trump administration’s effort to unwind decades of sanctions as part of a deal to end the war with Iran has created a head-spinning situation for governments, banks and other companies as they contemplate a shifting patchwork of new permissions and old restrictions.
